title: salix calostachya
intro: Salix calostachya, also known as the dwarf willow, is a species of willow tree native to China and parts of Russia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the salicin content found in its bark. The health benefits of Salix calostachya include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the bark of Salix calostachya is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
